data.title: Hoskinson Slams Ripple CEO Over CLARITY Act Support — Here Is Why the Rift Matters
data.description:
Charles Hoskinson, the co-founder of Cardano and a prominent figure in the cryptocurrency space, has openly criticized Brad Garlinghouse, the CEO of Ripple, for his support of the CLARITY Act. This legislation aims to provide regulatory clarity for digital assets and their classification in the United States. The clash between these two influential leaders highlights significant ideological differences within the crypto community regarding how best to achieve regulatory certainty and the future direction of the industry. Understanding the implications of their disagreement is crucial, as it may influence regulatory outcomes and shape the operational landscape for cryptocurrency projects moving forward.
source: https://blocknews.com/hoskinson-slams-ripple-ceo-over-clarity-act-support-here-is-why-the-rift-matters/

data.title: OpenAI Annualized Revenue Surpassed $20Bn In 2025
data.description:
OpenAI CFO Sarah Friar said in a blog post on Sunday that the company's annualized revenue has surpassed $20 billion in 2025, up from $6 billion in 2024.
source: https://catenaa.com/industries/technology/openai-annualized-revenue-surpassed-20bn-in-2025/
